ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the league is held */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport played in the league */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the league season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the league season */,
  "season_length" INTEGER /* Number of weeks in the league season */,
  "team_count" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league */,
  "relegation_rule" TEXT /* Relegation rules for the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leagues_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the team is based */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league where the team plays */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Stadium where the team plays home matches */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Manager of the team */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Coach of the team */,
  "captain" TEXT /* Captain of the team */,
  "team_value" REAL /* Market value of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league where the match is played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "match_time" TEXT /* Time of the match */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Stadium where the match is played */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Referee of the match */,
  "assistant_referees" TEXT /* Assistant referees for the match */,
  "fourth_official" TEXT /* Fourth official for the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match outcome */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the outcome is associated with */,
  "outcome_type" TEXT /* Type of the outcome (e.g., 1X, Over 2.5, Under 4.5) */,
  "odds" REAL /* Odds for the outcome */,
  "probability" REAL /* Probability of the outcome */,
  "betting_volume" INTEGER /* Total betting volume for the outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_outcomes_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., regular user, admin, data analyst) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the user */,
  "betting_history" TEXT /* Betting history of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bets" (
  "bet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the bet */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the bet is placed on */,
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* ID of the outcome the bet is placed on */,
  "bet_amount" REAL /* Amount of the bet */,
  "bet_date" TEXT /* Date the bet was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the bet (e.g., pending, won, lost) */,
  "payout" REAL /* Payout for the bet if won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bets_outcome_id FOREIGN KEY ("outcome_id") REFERENCES match_outcomes ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bets_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of match statistics */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the statistics are associated with */,
  "home_team_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the home team */,
  "away_team_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the away team */,
  "home_team_shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken by the home team */,
  "away_team_shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken by the away team */,
  "home_team_fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the home team */,
  "away_team_fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the away team */,
  "home_team_yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the home team */,
  "away_team_yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the away team */,
  "home_team_red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the home team */,
  "away_team_red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the away team */,
  "possession_home" REAL /* Possession percentage for the home team */,
  "possession_away" REAL /* Possession percentage for the away team */,
  "pass_accuracy_home" REAL /* Pass accuracy for the home team */,
  "pass_accuracy_away" REAL /* Pass accuracy for the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the information */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the information was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, bet) */,
  "page_visited" TEXT /* Specific page visited (e.g., match details, betting odds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity occurred */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bettor_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of bettor statistics */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the statistics are associated with */,
  "total_bets" INTEGER /* Total number of bets placed by the user */,
  "won_bets" INTEGER /* Number of bets won by the user */,
  "lost_bets" INTEGER /* Number of bets lost by the user */,
  "push_bets" INTEGER /* Number of bets resulting in a push (tie) */,
  "total_amount_bet" REAL /* Total amount bet by the user */,
  "total_winnings" REAL /* Total winnings of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bettor_stats_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
